chunks.title: David's Final Instructions to Solomon
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where David gives specific commands regarding Joab, Barzillai, and Shimei.

chunks.title: Death of David and Accession of Solomon
chunks.reason: Narrative summary of David's death, reign duration, and Solomon's secure establishment on the throne.

chunks.title: Adonijah's Request and Execution
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit covering Adonijah's request to Bathsheba, Solomon's reaction, and the execution of Adonijah.

chunks.title: Removal of Abiathar and Joab
chunks.reason: Narrative sequence detailing the removal of Abiathar from the priesthood and the execution of Joab.

chunks.title: Shimei's Exile and Execution
chunks.reason: A complete story arc showing Shimei's exile, his violation of the oath, and his subsequent execution.
